noticias.titulo: Stock Market Today: Dow Sinks As Fed Keeps Rates Pat; Powell Next (Live Coverage)
noticias.resumen: Major indexes continued to post losses and oil prices continued to surge after the Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged Wednesday. Meanwhile, earnings reports from four members of the Magnificent Seven are due after the market close.
